_comment: Bibliothèque officielle de prompts Solution Phone — pour ChatGPT-image / Gemini. Modifiables par Sebastien depuis brand/studio-prompts.json.
master_brand_prompt: BRAND: Solution Phone — premium smartphone repair shop in Mâcon, France, since 2014. STYLE: Apple keynote × Tesla × Bang & Olufsen. Cinematic, premium, minimalist, modern tech high-end. NEVER cheap, NEVER discount-shop, NEVER gaming RGB. STRICT COLOR PALETTE 60/30/10: 60% deep matte black #0D0D0D, 30% pure white #FFFFFF, 10% signature red #E10600 used ONLY as accents. LIGHTING: dramatic side lighting, subtle red rim-light, soft cinematic falloff. COMPOSITION: ultra minimalist, generous negative space, mobile-first readability. TYPOGRAPHY (when text): Montserrat Extra Bold for titles, Montserrat Regular for body. MATERIALS: matte black, premium glass, chrome/silver accents. QUALITY: 8K detail, studio photography, shallow depth of field. FORBIDDEN: watermarks, rainbow gradients, RGB neon, 3D cartoon, cheap retail typography, cluttered backgrounds, stock-photo people, lens flares.

themes.label: Smartphone occasion ajouté
themes.prompt:
{master_brand_prompt}

CREATE: A premium {aspect} visual ({dimensions}) announcing a refurbished smartphone in stock at Solution Phone Mâcon.

LAYOUT:
- Top-left: small red rounded square "S" logo (Solution Phone signature mark, do not add any other words)
- Top-right: red pill badge with text NOUVEAU EN STOCK in white Montserrat Extra Bold
- Center-left block: HUGE white title "{modele}", then GIGANTIC red "{prix} €" below
- Center-right: photorealistic 3/4 view of a {modele} smartphone in {couleur}, floating, subtle red glow halo behind it, soft shadow below. Keep device generic-premium-looking, no fake Apple/Samsung logo.
- Below price: 5 bullet rows, each = small red dot + Montserrat Extra Bold white text. Exact rows in this order:
   1. GRADE {grade}
   2. BATTERIE {batterie}%
   3. ETAT EXCELLENT
   4. GARANTIE 6 MOIS
   5. PIECES TESTEES
- Bottom: thin red bar with white text REPARATION · ACCESSOIRES · ACHAT · REVENTE
- Below the red bar: white Montserrat Regular line: 21 RUE GAMBETTA - 71000 MACON - 03 85 33 06 89

ABSOLUTE TEXT RULES:
- Copy every quoted text character-for-character, no translation, no paraphrase.
- Do NOT invent any other text, phone number, address, URL or hashtag.
- Use NO accents in the image text (write ETAT not ÉTAT, REPARATION not RÉPARATION).
- Battery is exactly {batterie}%, warranty is exactly 6 MOIS, address is exactly 21 RUE GAMBETTA - 71000 MACON.
- Spell-check: word is ETAT (E-T-A-T) never ETAI, word is PIECES (P-I-E-C-E-S) never PIESES.

themes.label: Promo / Réduction
themes.prompt:
{master_brand_prompt}

CREATE: A premium {aspect} visual ({dimensions}) announcing a promotion at Solution Phone Mâcon.

LAYOUT:
- Top-left: red rounded "S" logo only
- Center: red pill badge containing white Montserrat Extra Bold "-{reduction}€"
- Below: HUGE white title "{titre}" in Montserrat Extra Bold, all caps
- Below: "{sous_titre}" in Montserrat Regular medium gray
- Subtle red glow originating from behind the central text
- Right side: optional smartphone product visual with subtle red rim light
- Bottom: red CTA pill "DISPONIBLE EN BOUTIQUE" in white
- Footer line: 21 RUE GAMBETTA - 71000 MACON - 03 85 33 06 89

ABSOLUTE TEXT RULES:
- Discount is exactly -{reduction}€, never another number.
- No accents in image text.
- No invented phone/address/URL beside the official footer.

themes.label: Avis client 5 étoiles

variables.label: Commentaire (max 200 car)
variables.placeholder: Service rapide, prix correct, équipe au top.
variables.default: Service rapide, prix correct, equipe au top. Je recommande.

themes.prompt:
{master_brand_prompt}

CREATE: A premium editorial {aspect} visual ({dimensions}) reposting a 5-star Google review for Solution Phone.

LAYOUT:
- Top: a horizontal row of 5 gold stars (single accent color allowed for stars)
- Below stars: small red Montserrat Regular label AVIS GOOGLE 5 ETOILES
- Center: a large opening red quote mark, then the review comment in white Montserrat Regular italic, broken into 3-4 lines, max 220 characters:
   "{commentaire}"
- Bottom: a clean circular photo placeholder (soft warm gray gradient — do NOT generate a person's face), then author name {auteur} in white Montserrat Extra Bold, with date {date_relative} below in light gray Montserrat Regular
- Solution Phone red S logo bottom-right corner
- Footer thin red bar: 21 RUE GAMBETTA - 71000 MACON - solution-phone.fr

ABSOLUTE TEXT RULES:
- Quote text must be copied EXACTLY: "{commentaire}"
- Author name exact: "{auteur}"
- Date exact: "{date_relative}"
- Do NOT auto-correct, do NOT translate, do NOT add words.
- Stars are gold; red used only for the quote mark. Palette stays 60% black / 30% white / 10% red.

themes.label: QualiRépar -25€
themes.prompt:
{master_brand_prompt}

CREATE: A premium {aspect} visual ({dimensions}) highlighting the QualiRépar -25€ discount at Solution Phone Mâcon.

LAYOUT (50/50 split):
- LEFT HALF: photorealistic medium shot of a young male technician in a black hoodie with the small red S Solution Phone logo on chest, black nitrile gloves, holding a precision screwdriver, working on a disassembled smartphone on a blue QualiRépar repair mat. Microscope blurred background. Clean atelier, warm side light.
- RIGHT HALF (dark backdrop):
   - Top: red S logo small
   - HUGE white title two lines:
        REPARATEUR
        LABELLISE
   - Below in QualiRépar blue (#0066CC) Montserrat Extra Bold:
        QUALIREPAR
   - Below: a massive red rounded rectangle containing white Montserrat Extra Bold:
        -25€ SUR VOTRE REPARATION
   - Below: 4 tiny icon+label rows in white Montserrat Regular:
        PIECES CERTIFIEES · REPARATION DE QUALITE · GARANTIE 6 MOIS · ECO-RESPONSABLE
- Bottom: thin red bar with: 21 RUE GAMBETTA - 71000 MACON - 03 85 33 06 89

ABSOLUTE TEXT RULES:
- Exact strings: REPARATEUR LABELLISE, QUALIREPAR, -25€ SUR VOTRE REPARATION, GARANTIE 6 MOIS.
- No accents.
- The discount is exactly -25€.
- QualiRépar blue is allowed only on the label area, palette discipline elsewhere.

themes.label: Hydrogel — Protection écran
themes.prompt:
{master_brand_prompt}

CREATE: A premium {aspect} visual ({dimensions}) for the Solution Phone hydrogel screen protection range.

LAYOUT (top to bottom):
- Top: small red pill PROTECTION ECRAN in white Montserrat Extra Bold
- Title arrangement:
   - VERRE TREMPE in white Montserrat Extra Bold WITH a red strikethrough line through it
   - Directly below: MASSIVE red Montserrat Extra Bold word HYDROGEL
- Below: single line white Montserrat Regular: Film auto-cicatrisant pose en 5 MIN (make "5 MIN" pop in red)
- Center: photorealistic close-up of a flexible transparent hydrogel film draping over a black premium smartphone, subtle red glow underneath, a few abstract red shards floating to suggest impact protection
- Bottom: 4 small product cards in a row:
   CRYSTAL — 25€ — "Anti-reflets, hydrophobe, auto-cicatrisant"
   OBSIDIAN — 25€ — "Privacy, anti-reflets, auto-cicatrisant"
   SAPHIR — 15€ — "Anti-rayures, transparent HD"
   ONYX — 15€ — "Privacy, anti-rayures"
- Footer thin red bar: 21 RUE GAMBETTA - 71000 MACON - 03 85 33 06 89

ABSOLUTE TEXT RULES:
- Exact words: HYDROGEL (H-Y-D-R-O-G-E-L), VERRE TREMPE, PROTECTION ECRAN.
- Prices exact: 25€, 25€, 15€, 15€.
- No accents in image text.

themes.label: Avant / Après réparation
themes.prompt:
{master_brand_prompt}

CREATE: A premium {aspect} before/after visual ({dimensions}) showing a smartphone repair transformation at Solution Phone Mâcon.

LAYOUT:
- Vertical split with a thin red separator line in the middle
- LEFT HALF (label AVANT in red top-left): the {modele} with a dramatic cracked, fractured screen, dark moody lighting, broken glass spiderwebs, subtle red rim. Premium framing, no liquid or blood effects.
- RIGHT HALF (label APRES in green top-right): the same {modele}, screen pristine and lit, soft red glow halo behind, premium presentation
- Bottom band on black backdrop:
   - HUGE white Montserrat Extra Bold: REPARE EN MOINS D'1H
   - Below: {description_panne} in Montserrat Regular white smaller
- Optional small QualiRépar blue badge BONUS -25€ bottom-left
- Footer red bar: 21 RUE GAMBETTA - 71000 MACON - 03 85 33 06 89

ABSOLUTE TEXT RULES:
- Exact strings: AVANT, APRES, REPARE EN MOINS D'1H.
- No accents in image text.
- Description copied exactly: "{description_panne}".
